title: Set Up Tiptap Rich Text Editor in Next.js
summary: Full Tiptap v2 integration for Next.js — SSR-safe editor component, StarterKit, image/link extensions, controlled content, and persistence.
declaration: I will integrate Tiptap v2 (ProseMirror-based rich text editor) into this Next.js project. This covers installing packages, creating an SSR-safe editor component, configuring extensions, handling controlled content, and saving editor output as HTML or JSON. I will NOT use Draft.js, Quill, or Slate. If you need collaborative real-time editing, say so — that requires Liveblocks or Yjs on top of Tiptap.
